items.caption: An infographic detailing the stages of a rocket launch, from the initial booster stage to the final deployment of the payload. it features a series of illustrations and text annotations to explain the process. the rocket is shown in various stages of ascent, with the booster stage at the bottom, the main stage in the middle, and the payload stage at the top. the text provides information about the rocket's design, the carrier aircraft, and the specific model of the aircraft used. the infographic is designed to provide a clear and concise overview of the launch process, from the ground to the final deployment of the payload in space.
